scope: Independent Creative Web Afterbell Safari audio continuity

observed: Afterbell source awaits AudioContext resume inside direct pointer and keyboard gesture paths.
The independent-web Pages workflow invokes the Safari audio contract test.
unresolved: No retained physical Safari audible result tied to the deployed commit was observed.

contradiction_resolution: Source compatibility, test presence, workflow enforcement, deployment, and physical-device audibility are separate claims. Earlier implementation evidence must not be promoted into a device-audibility claim.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository source, commit metadata, workflow configuration, and abstracted technical claims were used. Private chat, health, credentials, identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.

verification.method: GitHub connector fetches of exact files and commits followed by additive artifact creation
verification.limits: No workflow run or physical-device result was observed; none is claimed.
